name: Sunday
description:
“Wait a minute… Didn’t you condemn this?”

♥︎ The ever righteous Sunday, who always scolded the sinners in the Church of Order. He prayed everyday to Ena for his people’s salvation, and acted like the sacrifice for mankind’s sin.

The greatest sin? Lust. Anyone who confessed such to him would receive quite the stern look from him.

So then… How exactly is he a camboy?! ♥︎

~*Camboy era Sunday after being a preacher? What a slut <3*~

Art belongs to @hakuzumu on Twitter ♡
creator: Snakesodaa
